090101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ, ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ, ᏴᏫ ᎬᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎬᎩᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏥᏌᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᎩᏁᏤᎸᎯ;
090101.english: Paul, an apostle, (not of men, neither by man, but by Jesus Christ, and God the Father, who raised him from the dead;)
090101.phonetic: Quo-la, v-gi-nv-si-dv, yv-wi gv-gi-nv-si-dv ni-ge-sv-na, a-le yv-wi gv-gi-ne-tse-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, Tsi-sa-s-gi-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge na-s-gi tsu-le-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi u-yo-hu-sv-i na-s-gi gv-gi-ne-tse-lv-hi;

090102.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᏦᏤᏙᎭ, ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᏗᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎨᎴᏏᏱ;
090102.english: And all the brethren which are with me, unto the churches of Galatia:
090102.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-dv i-da-li-nv-tli tso-tse-do-ha, wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si di-tsa-ne-lo-di de-tsa-da-tlu-wa-di-sv Ge-le-si-yi;

090103.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎨᏣᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ,
090103.english: Grace be to you and peace from God the Father, and from our Lord Jesus Christ,
090103.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di, ge-tsa-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv,

090104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᏓᏲᏎ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏥᏍᏗ ᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎲ ᎤᏲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ;
090104.english: Who gave himself for our sins, that he might deliver us from this present evil world, according to the will of God and our Father:
090104.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-du-da-yo-se a-yv i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv tsi-s-di ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-i, na-s-gi i-gu-da-le-s-di-yi go-hi ge-sv e-hv u-yo-i, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le I-gi-do-da;

090105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
090105.english: To whom be glory for ever and ever. Amen.
090105.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di ni-go-hi-lv a-le ni-go-hi-lv-i.  E-me-nv.

090106.cherokee: ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎦ ᏥᎾᏞᎬ ᎡᏣᏓᏅᎡᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏫᏥᎧᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏥᏥᎬᏫᏳᏔᏅ.
090106.english: I marvel that ye are so soon removed from him that called you into the grace of Christ unto another gospel:
090106.phonetic: A-gi-s-qua-ni-go-s-ga tsi-na-tle-gv e-tsa-da-nv-e-lv na-s-gi na i-tsi-ya-nv-dv wi-tsi-ka-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv, nv-wa-da-le o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv tsi-tsi-gv-wi-yu-ta-nv.

090107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ; ᎠᏁᎭᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎨᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
090107.english: Which is not another; but there be some that trouble you, and would pervert the gospel of Christ.
090107.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-wa-da-le ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi; a-ne-ha-s-gi-ni-no-nv ge-tsa-de-ya-do-di-s-gi, a-le u-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-di-yi u-na-du-li-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga.

090108.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏱᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
090108.english: But though we, or an angel from heaven, preach any other gospel unto you than that which we have preached unto you, let him be accursed.
090108.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni na-s-quo a-yv, a-le di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi, nv-wa-da-le o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv yi-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv, na-s-gi ga-yu-la i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi a-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di.

090109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᏲᎩᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏣᎵᏥᏙᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎾᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
090109.english: As we said before, so say I now again, If any man preach any other gospel unto you than that ye have received, let him be accursed.
090109.phonetic: Na-s-gi ga-yu-la i-yo-gi-we-dv tsi-gi, u-tlo-yi-quo hi-a go-hi ge-sv ni-tsi-we-ha, I-yu-no gi-lo i-tsa-li-tsi-do-ne-he-s-di nv-wa-da-le o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, na-no na-s-gi ga-yu-la di-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di.

090110.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎪ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏆᎵᎢ ᏂᏕᎬᏁᎭ?  ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᎨ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎩᏲᎭ?  ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏏ ᏯᎩᏲᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᏱᎦᎩ.
090110.english: For do I now persuade men, or God? or do I seek to please men? for if I yet pleased men, I should not be the servant of Christ.
090110.phonetic: Go-hi-ye-no ge-sv tsi-go yv-wi di-qua-li-i ni-de-gv-ne-ha?  U-ne-la-nv-hi-ge?  tsi-go-ge o-s-dv u-ni-ye-lv-di yv-wi a-gi-yo-ha?  i-yu-ye-no o-s-dv u-ni-ye-lv-di yv-wi a-si ya-gi-yo-ha, v-tla Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-do-hi yi-ga-gi.

090111.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎭ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏣᏆᎵᏥᏙᏅᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫ ᏧᏕᏲᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ.
090111.english: But I certify you, brethren, that the gospel which was preached of me is not after man.
090111.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsv-no-ne-ha i-da-li-nv-tli, na-s-gi hi-a o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv tsa-qua-li-tsi-do-nv-gi, v-tla yv-wi tsu-de-yo-nv-hi yi-gi.

090112.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎬᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏇᏲᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᎸᎯ.
090112.english: For I neither received it of man, neither was I taught it, but by the revelation of Jesus Christ.
090112.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no yv-wi di-gv-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-hi yi-gi, v-tla a-le gi-lo a-que-yo-nv-hi yi-gi, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni gv-ni-ge-sv i-ya-quv-ne-lv-hi.

090113.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒ ᎠᏆᎴᏂᏙᎸ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎦᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᏥᏯᏕᏯᏙᏔᏅ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏛᏔᏅᎢ.
090113.english: For ye have heard of my conversation in time past in the Jews' religion, how that beyond measure I persecuted the church of God, and wasted it:
090113.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-ga-nv-ye-no nu-s-dv tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv a-qua-le-ni-do-lv A-ni-tsu-si tsu-na-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di de-tsi-ga-hna-wa-di-sv-i, na-s-gi u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi ga-tsi-ya-de-ya-do-ta-nv tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga, a-le de-tsi-dv-ta-nv-i.

090114.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏁᏉᏤᎲ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏥᎦᏙᎥᏍᎬᎢ ᏕᏥᎪᎾᏛᏛᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎢᏗᎦᏲᎦᏛᏅ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛᎩ ᏓᏇᎷᎬᎩ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯ.
090114.english: And profited in the Jews' religion above many my equals in mine own nation, being more exceedingly zealous of the traditions of my fathers.
090114.phonetic: A-le a-gi-ne-quo-tse-hv A-ni-tsu-si tsu-na-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di tsi-ga-do-v-s-gv-i de-tsi-go-na-dv-dv-gi u-ni-tsa-ti i-di-ga-yo-ga-dv-nv di-qua-tse-li yv-wi, u-tli i-ga-i u-li-ni-gi-dv a-qua-da-nv-dv-gi da-que-lu-gv-gi di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge u-ni-no-he-lv-hi.

090115.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎡᏥ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏆᏓᏓᎴᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᏯᏅᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ,
090115.english: But when it pleased God, who separated me from my mother's womb, and called me by his grace,
090115.phonetic: A-se-no hna-quo o-si-yu u-ye-lv-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi na-hi-yu e-tsi a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-sv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv a-qua-da-da-le-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, a-le gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-gi-ya-nv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi,

090116.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎦᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏴᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ ᎤᏂᏁᎯ ᏱᏗᎦᏥᏯᏁᎶᏔᏁᎢ;
090116.english: To reveal his Son in me, that I might preach him among the heathen; immediately I conferred not with flesh and blood:
090116.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-we-tsi a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-di-yi, na-s-gi a-yv ga-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsi-yv-ne-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i; gi-la-quo i-yv-dv, v-tla u-ni-que-da-li a-le gi-gv u-ni-ne-hi yi-di-ga-tsi-ya-ne-lo-ta-ne-i;

090117.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏱᏩᎩᎶᏎᎢ, ᏱᎦᏥᏩᏛᎲᏎ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏂ; ᎠᎴᏈᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᏩᎩᎶᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏕᎹᏍᎦ ᏛᎠᎩᎷᏨᎩ.
090117.english: Neither went I up to Jerusalem to them which were apostles before me; but I went into Arabia, and returned again unto Damascus.
090117.phonetic: V-tla a-le Tsi-lu-si-li-mi yi-wa-gi-lo-se-i, yi-ga-tsi-wa-dv-hv-se i-gv-yi ge-tsi-nv-si-dv i-yu-na-li-s-ta-nv-hi a-yv o-ni; A-le-qui-yi-s-gi-ni wa-gi-lo-sv-gi, a-le ta-li-ne De-ma-s-ga dv-a-gi-lu-tsv-gi.

090118.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏦᎢ ᏫᏄᏕᏘᏴᎲ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏇᏅᏒᎩ ᏈᏓ ᎥᏥᏩᏛᎲᏒᎩ, ᎯᏍᎩᎦᏚᏃ ᏧᏒᎯᏛ ᎦᏁᎸ ᎠᎩᏅᎩ.
090118.english: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to see Peter, and abode with him fifteen days.
090118.phonetic: Hna-quo-no tso-i wi-nu-de-ti-yv-hv Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-que-nv-sv-gi Qui-da v-tsi-wa-dv-hv-sv-gi, hi-s-gi-ga-du-no tsu-sv-hi-dv ga-ne-lv a-gi-nv-gi.

090119.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏥᎪᎡ ᏥᎻ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ.
090119.english: But other of the apostles saw I none, save James the Lord's brother.
090119.phonetic: A-ni-so-i-s-gi-ni ge-tsi-nv-si-dv v-tla gi-lo yi-tsi-go-e Tsi-mi u-wa-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-na-li-nv-tli.

090120.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏥᎪᎥᏍᎦ.
090120.english: Now the things which I write unto you, behold, before God, I lie not.
090120.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a tsi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha, gv-ni-yu-quo, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i, v-tla yi-ga-tsi-go-v-s-ga.

090121.english: Afterwards I came into the regions of Syria and Cilicia;

090122.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎠᏆᎧᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᏧᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᎶᏗ;
090122.english: And was unknown by face unto the churches of Judaea which were in Christ:
090122.phonetic: A-le v-tla a-ni-ga-ta-hi yi-ge-se a-qua-ka-dv na-s-gi-tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv Tsu-di-yi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv di-gv-wa-ne-lo-di;

090123.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᎯᏉᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎨᏎᎢ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏲ ᏥᏂᎬᎿᎭᏕᎬ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ ᎢᎧᏃᎮᎭ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏣᏛᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
090123.english: But they had heard only, That he which persecuted us in times past now preacheth the faith which once he destroyed.
090123.phonetic: U-na-dv-ga-nv-hi-quo-s-gi-ni-no-nv ge-se-i hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-i, Na-s-gi na u-yo tsi-ni-gv-hna-de-gv tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv, hna-quo a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga i-ka-no-he-ha go-hi-yu-di ge-sv na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu tsa-dv-di-s-gv-gi.

090124.english: And they glorified God in me.

090201.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏚ ᏫᏄᏕᏘᏴᎲ ᎣᏂ, ᏔᎵᏁ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎠᏇᏅᏒᎩ ᎣᏍᏕᎲᎩ ᏆᏂᏆ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᏥᏯᏘᏅᏒᎩ.
090201.english: Then fourteen years after I went up again to Jerusalem with Barnabas, and took Titus with me also.
090201.phonetic: Hna-quo-no ni-ga-du wi-nu-de-ti-yv-hv o-ni, ta-li-ne Tsi-lu-si-li-mi a-que-nv-sv-gi o-s-de-hv-gi Qua-ni-qua, a-le Da-da-si na-s-quo v-tsi-ya-ti-nv-sv-gi.

090202.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏋᏁᎸᎢ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏇᏅᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎦᏥᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸᎩ ᏗᏂᏃᏣᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏯᏎᎦᎩ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏱᏙᏥᏍᏆᎸᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏱᏓᎩᏍᏆᎸᏔᏅ ᎠᏇᎵᏒᎩ.
090202.english: And I went up by revelation, and communicated unto them that gospel which I preach among the Gentiles, but privately to them which were of reputation, lest by any means I should run, or had run, in vain.
090202.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-ge-sv nv-quv-ne-lv-i nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi a-que-nv-sv-gi, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv na-s-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi ga-tsi-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-hv-i; a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha-s-gi-ni u-de-li-dv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv-gi di-ni-no-tsa-li ge-sv-i, ya-se-ga-gi a-se-quo yi-do-tsi-s-qua-lv-da a-le a-se-quo yi-da-gi-s-qua-lv-ta-nv a-que-li-sv-gi.

090203.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᏓᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏕᎯ, ᎠᎪᎢ ᏂᎨᏒ, ᎠᏎ ᎠᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ;
090203.english: But neither Titus, who was with me, being a Greek, was compelled to be circumcised:
090203.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla na-s-quo Da-da-si, na-s-gi o-s-de-hi, A-go-i ni-ge-sv, a-se a-tsi-u-s-de-se-di yi-ge-se-i;

090204.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᏄᏪᎵᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏥᏴᏔᏂᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏕᎵᏛ ᎤᏂᏴᎵᎸ ᎤᏂᎨᏛᏗᏱ ᎣᎦᏓᏤᎵᎦᏯ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎣᎩᎲᎢ, ᏦᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᎢᎪᎬᏁᏗᏱ;
090204.english: And that because of false brethren unawares brought in, who came in privily to spy out our liberty which we have in Christ Jesus, that they might bring us into bondage:
090204.phonetic: A-le nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-na-li-nv-tli nu-we-li-s-dv-na ge-tsi-yv-ta-ni-lv-hi, na-s-gi nv-de-li-dv u-ni-yv-li-lv u-ni-ge-dv-di-yi o-ga-da-tse-li-ga-ya ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv o-gi-hv-i, tso-gi-na-tla-i i-go-gv-ne-di-yi;

090205.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏑᏟᎶᏛ ᎤᏅ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏱᏙᏤᎵᏎᎴᎢ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏂᏙᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏁᎮᏛ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ.
090205.english: To whom we gave place by subjection, no, not for an hour; that the truth of the gospel might continue with you.
090205.phonetic: Na-s-gi v-tla su-tli-lo-dv u-nv i-go-hi-dv u-na-ne-la-gi yi-do-tse-li-se-le-i e-la-di ni-do-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i; na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-ne-he-dv u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv i-gv-wa-s-di-ha i-gv-wa-s-di-ha i-tse-la-di-da-s-di-yi.

090206.cherokee: Ꮎ-ᏍᎩᏂᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏗᏂᏃᏨᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏍᏛᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏋᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᎸᏉᏗᎭ ᎩᎶ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏗᏂᏃᏣᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᎬᎩᏁᏉᎡᎴᎢ;
090206.english: But of these who seemed to be somewhat, (whatsoever they were, it maketh no matter to me: God accepteth no man's person:) for they who seemed to be somewhat in conference added nothing to me:
090206.phonetic: Na--s-gi-ni-no ye-li di-ni-no-tsv-li ge-sv-i, na-s-gi nu-na-s-dv-i v-tla go-hu-s-di a-quv-ne-hi yi-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla yi-ga-lv-quo-di-ha gi-lo nu-s-dv-i; na-s-gi-ye-no di-ni-no-tsa-li ge-sv v-tla go-hu-s-di yi-gv-gi-ne-quo-e-le-i;

090207.cherokee: Ꭰ-ᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎾ [ᎤᎾᏛᎪᏗᏱ] ᎠᏴ ᎥᏆᎨᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᎨᏥᏅᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ [ᎤᎾᏛᎪᏗᏱ] ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏈᏓ ᏣᎦᎨᏅᏕᎢ;
090207.english: But contrariwise, when they saw that the gospel of the uncircumcision was committed unto me, as the gospel of the circumcision was unto Peter;
090207.phonetic: A--s-gi-ni i-di-tlv, u-ni-go-hv na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ni-di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-na [u-na-dv-go-di-yi] a-yv v-qua-ge-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi-ya di-ge-tsi-nv-s-de-se-lv-hi [u-na-dv-go-di-yi] o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Qui-da tsa-ga-ge-nv-de-i;

090208.cherokee: (ᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᏈᏓ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎯ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᎤᏁᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎾᏋᏁᎲᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏕᏥᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎲᎢ;)
090208.english: (For he that wrought effectually in Peter to the apostleship of the circumcision, the same was mighty in me toward the Gentiles:)
090208.phonetic: (Na-s-gi-ni Qui-da u-li-ni-gi-dv i-yu-wa-ne-hi a-tsi-nv-si-dv ge-sv di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi u-ne-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi na-s-quo a-yv a-qua-li-ni-gi-dv na-quv-ne-hv-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi de-tsi-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-hv-i;)

090209.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᏏᏆᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎵᎫᏍᏙ ᎨᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎩᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᏂᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᏕᎪᎩᎾᏌᏕᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎴ ᏆᏂᏆ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ ᏙᎦᏚᏓᏛᎢ; ᎠᏴ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏁᎲ ᏬᎩᏂᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎤᏅᏒᏃ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ;
090209.english: And when James, Cephas, and John, who seemed to be pillars, perceived the grace that was given unto me, they gave to me and Barnabas the right hands of fellowship; that we should go unto the heathen, and they unto the circumcision.
090209.phonetic: A-le Tsi-mi, a-le Si-qua-si, a-le Tsa-ni, na-s-gi di-li-gu-s-do ge-tsi-ye-lv-i, u-ni-go-hv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi v-gi-ne-lv-i, a-ni-ga-ti-si-di-tlv de-go-gi-na-sa-de-ta-nv-gi a-yv a-le Qua-ni-qua gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-hi do-ga-du-da-dv-i; a-yv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi di-ne-hv wo-gi-ni-lo-hi-s-di-yi u-gv-wa-li, u-nv-sv-no di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi di-ne-hv-i;

090210.cherokee: ᏑᏓᎴᎩᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ [ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬᎩ,] ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏍᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏆᎵᎦᎵᏴᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ.
090210.english: Only they would that we should remember the poor; the same which I also was forward to do.
090210.phonetic: Su-da-le-gi-s-gi-ni-no-nv [u-na-du-li-s-gv-gi,] na-s-gi tso-s-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi; na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-qua-li-ga-li-yv-sv-gi na-s-gi i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi.

090211.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎥᏗᎣᎩ ᏭᎷᏨ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏕᏥᎦᏘᎸᏒᎩ, ᎦᏰᎫᎢᏍᏙᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒᎩ.
090211.english: But when Peter was come to Antioch, I withstood him to the face, because he was to be blamed.
090211.phonetic: A-se-no Qui-da V-di-o-gi wu-lu-tsv gv-ni-ge-sv de-tsi-ga-ti-lv-sv-gi, ga-ye-gu-i-s-do-di-ye-no ge-sv-gi.

090212.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏥᎻᏱ ᏅᏗᏂᎶᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎷᏨ, ᎤᏓᏅᏒᎩ ᏚᏓᏓᎴᏓᏁᎸᎩ, ᏕᎦᎾᏰᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᏅᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ.
090212.english: For before that certain came from James, he did eat with the Gentiles: but when they were come, he withdrew and separated himself, fearing them which were of the circumcision.
090212.phonetic: A-si-quo-ye-no gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di Tsi-mi-yi nv-di-ni-lo-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi i-tsu-la-ha a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-gi; a-se-no na-s-gi u-ni-lu-tsv, u-da-nv-sv-gi du-da-da-le-da-ne-lv-gi, de-ga-na-ye-s-gv-gi na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-nv-s-de-se-lv-hi.

090213.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᎬᏩᎵᎪᏁᎸᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏆᏂᏆ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᎬᏩᏘᎾᏫᏛᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
090213.english: And the other Jews dissembled likewise with him; insomuch that Barnabas also was carried away with their dissimulation.
090213.phonetic: A-le a-ni-so-i A-ni-tsu-si u-na-tlo-na-s-ta-nv-gi na-s-quo v-gv-wa-li-go-ne-lv-gi; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di Qua-ni-qua na-s-quo v-gv-wa-ti-na-wi-dv-ta-nv-gi a-na-tlo-na-s-di-s-gv-i.

090214.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ  ᎠᎩᎪᎲ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏥᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᏈᏓ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎯ, ᎯᏧᏏ ᏥᎩ, ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᏰᎭ, ᎠᏂᏧᏏᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎮᎲᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎾᏕᏗᏱ ᏥᏂᏕᎲᏁᎭ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ?
090214.english: But when I saw that they walked not uprightly according to the truth of the gospel, I said unto Peter before them all, If thou, being a Jew, livest after the manner of Gentiles, and not as do the Jews, why compellest thou the Gentiles to live as do the Jews?
090214.phonetic: A-se-no  a-gi-go-hv ni-du-yu-go-dv-na na-na-dv-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya du-yu-go-dv da-de-yo-hv-s-gv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, ni-ga-dv a-ni-ga-ta-hv hi-a nv-tsi-we-se-lv-gi Qui-da, i-yu-no ni-hi, Hi-tsu-si tsi-gi, tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi nu-na-s-dv na-s-gi-ya yi-nu-s-di ye-ha, A-ni-tsu-si-no nu-s-dv a-ne-hv na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv-na yi-gi he-hv-i, ga-do-no A-ni-tsu-si nu-s-dv a-ne-hv na-s-gi-ya u-na-de-di-yi tsi-ni-de-hv-ne-ha tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi?

090215.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎢᏗᏧᏏ ᎢᎦᏕᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾᏃ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎢᎦᏕᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ,
090215.english: We who are Jews by nature, and not sinners of the Gentiles,
090215.phonetic: A-yv I-di-tsu-si i-ga-de-nv-hi tsi-gi, a-ni-s-ga-na-no tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi nu-na-s-dv i-ga-de-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi,

090216.cherokee: ᏥᏗᎦᏔᎭᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎡᏙᎢᏳᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏂᏓᏛᏁᎲᎢ; ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏴᎬᏚᏓᎴᏍᏓ.
090216.english: Knowing that a man is not justified by the works of the law, but by the faith of Jesus Christ, even we have believed in Jesus Christ, that we might be justified by the faith of Christ, and not by the works of the law: for by the works of the law shall no flesh be justified.
090216.phonetic: Tsi-di-ga-ta-ha-s-gi-ni na-s-gi yv-wi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv na-dv-ne-hv na-du-da-le-s-di-s-gv-na ge-sv-i, go-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi a-yv e-do-i-yu-nv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi i-ga-du-da-le-s-do-di-yi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv, v-tla-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv ni-da-dv-ne-hv-i; di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no ni-ga-we-s-gv na-dv-ne-hv v-tla gi-lo u-que-da-li yv-gv-du-da-le-s-da.

090217.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ, ᎢᎩᏲᎲ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏗᏍᎦᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎪ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎠᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ.
090217.english: But if, while we seek to be justified by Christ, we ourselves also are found sinners, is therefore Christ the minister of sin? God forbid.
090217.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni, i-gi-yo-hv Ga-lo-ne-dv i-gu-da-le-s-di-yi, gv-ni-ge-sv yi-nu-li-s-ta-nv i-gv-sv na-s-quo i-di-s-ga-na-hi-yu ge-sv-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-go a-s-ga-na a-s-de-li-s-gi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha?  gv-wa-tli-s-di.

090218.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏲᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏱᏙᎦᏁᏍᎨᎭ, ᎠᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏂᎬᏁᎭ.
090218.english: For if I build again the things which I destroyed, I make myself a transgressor.
090218.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no na-s-gi di-gi-yo-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv ta-li-ne yi-do-ga-ne-s-ge-ha, a-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv yi-ni-gv-ne-ha.

090219.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎠᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎠᏆᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ.
090219.english: For I through the law am dead to the law, that I might live unto God.
090219.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv a-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi-quo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li a-qua-le-ni-da-s-di-yi.

090220.cherokee: ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏙᎩᎾᏛᏅ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎢᎩ, ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎠᎩᏯᎠ; ᏄᏍᏛᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᎴᏂᏙᎲ ᎠᏂ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᎥᎢ, ᎦᎴᏂᏙᎭ ᏥᏯᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏥᏚᏓᏲᏎ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
090220.english: I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but Christ liveth in me: and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by the faith of the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself for me.
090220.phonetic: Da-da-hna-wa-s-dv i-tsu-la-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv do-gi-na-dv-nv; a-se-no a-yv gv-no-dv i-gi, v-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv hna-quo a-yv yi-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni gv-no-dv a-gi-ya-a; nu-s-dv-no hna-quo ga-le-ni-do-hv a-ni u-que-da-li ge-v-i, ga-le-ni-do-ha tsi-ya-li-s-ga-s-do-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi; na-s-gi a-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu tsi-ge-sv-gi, a-le u-wa-sv tsi-du-da-yo-se a-yv a-gi-s-de-li-s-gv-i.

090221.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏲᏍᏗᏎ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏳᏲᏞᏒ.
090221.english: I do not frustrate the grace of God: for if righteousness come by the law, then Christ is dead in vain.
090221.phonetic: V-tla yi-tsi-yo-s-di-se gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi; i-yu-ye-no a-du-da-le-s-di ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di yv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, hna-quo ga-lo-ne-dv a-se-quo-quo yu-yo-tle-sv.

090301.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏁᎫ ᎨᎴᏏᏱ ᎢᏤᎯ, ᎦᎪ ᎢᏥᎶᎾᏍᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᏕᏥᎧᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᏛ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ.
090301.english: O foolish Galatians, who hath bewitched you, that ye should not obey the truth, before whose eyes Jesus Christ hath been evidently set forth, crucified among you?
090301.phonetic: I-tsi-ne-gu Ge-le-si-yi i-tse-hi, ga-go i-tsi-lo-na-s-ta-nv, na-s-gi i-tso-hi-yu-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ni-tsv-ne-lv u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, ni-hi de-tsi-ka-nv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-lv da-da-hna-wa-s-dv ga-dv i-tse-hv-i.

090302.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏍᎩᏃᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎪ ᏕᏥᏲᎯᏎᎴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᏥᎪᎨ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯ ᎢᏣᏛᎩᏍᎬᎢ?
090302.english: This only would I learn of you, Received ye the Spirit by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?
090302.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi u-wa-sv s-gi-no-ne-di-yi a-qua-du-li-ha; A-da-nv-do-s-go de-tsi-yo-hi-se-le nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i, tsi-go-ge nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge i-tso-hi-yu-hi i-tsa-dv-gi-s-gv-i?

090303.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏉᏍᎪ ᎢᏥᏁᎫ?  ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ ᏥᏣᎴᏅᎲ, ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏍᎪ ᎬᏗ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏗᎭ?
090303.english: Are ye so foolish? having begun in the Spirit, are ye now made perfect by the flesh?
090303.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-quo-s-go i-tsi-ne-gu?  A-da-nv-do gv-di tsi-tsa-le-nv-hv, u-que-da-li-s-go gv-di i-tsi-s-qua-di-ha?

090304.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᏨ?  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏱᎩ.
090304.english: Have ye suffered so many things in vain? if it be yet in vain.
090304.phonetic: Tsi-go na-s-gi ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-se-quo-quo i-tsi-gi-li-yo-tsv?  i-yu-no ho-wa a-se-quo-quo yi-gi.

090305.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏥᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᏥᎪ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᏛᎩᏍᎬ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ?
090305.english: He therefore that ministereth to you the Spirit, and worketh miracles among you, doeth he it by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?
090305.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na A-da-nv-do i-tsi-ne-hi tsi-gi, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi tsi-gi i-tse-hv-i, tsi-go di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv na-dv-ne-hv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha?  tsi-go-ge u-wo-hi-yu-hi a-dv-gi-s-gv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha?

090306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᏬᎯᏳᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏥᏄᏛᏁᎶ ᏣᏥᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴᎢ.
090306.english: Even as Abraham believed God, and it was accounted to him for righteousness.
090306.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya E-qua-ha-mi tsu-wo-hi-yu-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le du-yu-go-dv tsi-nu-dv-ne-lo tsa-tsi-ye-lv-na-ne-le-i.

090307.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090307.english: Know ye therefore that they which are of faith, the same are the children of Abraham.
090307.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di na-s-gi na a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ge-sv, na-s-gi E-qua-ha-mi tsu-we-tsi ge-sv-i.

090308.cherokee: ᎪᏪᎵᏃ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᏣᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎬᏗ ᏙᏗᎫᏓᎴᏏᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏥᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᏅᏛᏂᏌᏂ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᎡᎳᏂᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
090308.english: And the scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the heathen through faith, preached before the gospel unto Abraham, saying, In thee shall all nations be blessed.
090308.phonetic: Go-we-li-no ga-lv-quo-di i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi tsa-go-wa-ti-s-ge na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi go-hi-yu-di gv-di do-di-gu-da-le-si-sv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-le E-qua-ha-mi, hi-a na-tsi-we-se-le-i, Ni-hi nv-dv-ni-sa-ni ni-ga-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv e-la-ni-gv o-s-dv i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

090309.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎰ ᎨᎦᏠᏯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᎯᏍᏗ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ.
090309.english: So then they which be of faith are blessed with faithful Abraham.
090309.phonetic: Ho-wa-no na-s-gi a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ge-sv o-s-dv nu-na-li-s-da-ne-ho ge-ga-tlo-ya-s-di-s-go o-s-dv nu-li-s-da-ne-lv u-wo-hi-yu-hi-s-di E-qua-ha-mi.

090310.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎬᏪᎳ, ᎨᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᏂᏓᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
090310.english: For as many as are of the works of the law are under the curse: for it is written, Cursed is every one that continueth not in all things which are written in the book of the law to do them.
090310.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv i-ya-dv-ne-di-yi a-na-li-s-ga-s-do-di-s-gi, na-s-gi ge-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-gv-we-la, Ge-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di na-ni-v gi-lo ni-da-ni-ka-hna-wa-de-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di na-na-dv-ne-hv ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi go-we-lv-i.

090311.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏛᏂᏗᏍᏕᏍᏗ.
090311.english: But that no man is justified by the law in the sight of God, it is evident: for, The just shall live by faith.
090311.phonetic: A-se-no gi-lo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-du-da-le-s-di-s-gv-na ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu; Na-s-gi-ye-no du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv u-dv-ni-di-s-de-s-di.

090312.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏱᏂᎬᏁᎭ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ, ᎩᎶ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏛᏂᏗᏍᏕᏍᏗ.
090312.english: And the law is not of faith: but, The man that doeth them shall live in them.
090312.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no v-tla go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-li-s-de-lv-do-di yi-ni-gv-ne-ha; hi-a-s-gi-ni, Gi-lo yv-wi na-s-gi na-dv-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi u-dv-ni-di-s-de-s-di.

090313.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎦᎫᏴᎲ ᎢᎫᏓᎴᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏍᎦᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ, ᎠᏥᏍᎦᏨᎯ ᎩᎶ ᏡᎬ ᎠᎦᏛᏅᎯ.
090313.english: Christ hath redeemed us from the curse of the law, being made a curse for us: for it is written, Cursed is every one that hangeth on a tree:
090313.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv i-ga-gu-yv-hv i-gu-da-le-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-da-s-ga-i-s-do-di ge-sv-i, a-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi nu-li-s-ta-nv a-yv i-gi-s-de-li-s-gv-i; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la, A-tsi-s-ga-tsv-hi gi-lo tlu-gv a-ga-dv-nv-hi.

090314.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎾᎦᏛᏁᎸ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090314.english: That the blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Jesus Christ; that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.
090314.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-s-dv na-ga-dv-ne-lv E-qua-ha-mi na-s-gi u-ni-lu-tse-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi; na-s-gi e-tsi-ne-di-yi A-da-nv-do a-du-i-s-dv go-hi-yu-di gv-do-di ge-sv-i.

090315.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᏥᏁᎦ; ᎾᏍᏉ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏚᎾᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏛᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏴᎬᏲᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎦᏁᏉᏣ.
090315.english: Brethren, I speak after the manner of men; Though it be but a man's covenant, yet if it be confirmed, no man disannulleth, or addeth thereto.
090315.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, yv-wi u-ni-ne-i-s-di tsi-ne-ga; Na-s-quo yv-wi-quo ka-no-he-dv du-na-tlo-hi-s-dv a-s-da-yi-dv-hi yi-gi, v-tla gi-lo yv-gv-yo-s-da, a-le v-tla a-ga-ne-quo-tsa.

090316.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎨᏥᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ.  ᎥᏝ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏣᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ, ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᏌᏉᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ, [ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ,] ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᎩ.
090316.english: Now to Abraham and his seed were the promises made. He saith not, And to seeds, as of many; but as of one, And to thy seed, which is Christ.
090316.phonetic: A-le E-qua-ha-mi a-le na-s-gi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv tsu-da-le-nv-dv ge-tsi-du-i-s-da-ne-le-i.  V-tla hi-a yi-ni-ga-we-ha, a-le ni-hi di-tsa-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi, i-lv-s-gi tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya-i; sa-quo-quo-s-gi-ni tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya, [hi-a ni-ga-we-ha,] a-le ni-hi tsa-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi; na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-gi.

090317.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏱᏛᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏅᎩᏧᏈ ᏦᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏫᏄᏕᏘᏴᎲ ᎣᏂ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎬᏩᏲᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᎢ.
090317.english: And this I say, that the covenant, that was confirmed before of God in Christ, the law, which was four hundred and thirty years after, cannot disannul, that it should make the promise of none effect.
090317.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-s-gi ni-tsi-we-ha, Na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gv-wa-li na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-yu-la gv-wa-s-da-yi-dv-hi tsi-ge-se-i, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di nv-gi-tsu-qui tso-a-s-go-hi wi-nu-de-ti-yv-hv o-ni ga-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi tsi-gi, v-tla gv-wa-yo-s-do-di yi-gi, na-s-gi ye-li a-se-quo i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi a-du-i-s-dv-i.

090318.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎣᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲ ᏴᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᏴᏗᎬᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎴ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏮᏔᏁᎢ.
090318.english: For if the inheritance be of the law, it is no more of promise: but God gave it to Abraham by promise.
090318.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no o-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv yv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, v-tla a-du-i-s-dv yv-di-gv-da-le-hv-s-ga; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni E-qua-ha-mi u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-le a-du-i-s-di-s-gv u-wv-ta-ne-i.

090319.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ?  ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏫᎫᏓᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏥᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ; [ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ] ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏄᏅᎿᎭᏕᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏒᎦᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏁᎴᏁᎯ.
090319.english: Wherefore then serveth the law? It was added because of transgressions, till the seed should come to whom the promise was made; and it was ordained by angels in the hand of a mediator.
090319.phonetic: Ga-do-no gv-do-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di?  a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge wi-gu-da-ta-nv-hi ge-se-i, na-s-gi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-tsi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv u-na-nu-go-i-s-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gi; [a-le na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di] di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi o-s-dv nu-nv-hna-de-ge na-s-gi tsu-sv-ga-le a-ye-li ne-le-ne-hi.

090320.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏗᎴᏁᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏉ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎴᏁᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏉ.
090320.english: Now a mediator is not a mediator of one, but God is one.
090320.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-ye-li di-le-ne-hi tsi-ge-so v-tla a-si-yv-wi-quo a-ye-li a-le-ne-hi yi-ge-so-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni a-si-yv-wi-quo.

090321.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏍᎪᏃ ᏓᏡᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ?  ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎨᏎ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎬᏩᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎨᎢ.
090321.english: Is the law then against the promises of God? God forbid: for if there had been a law given which could have given life, verily righteousness should have been by the law.
090321.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-s-go-no da-tlu-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi du-du-i-s-ta-nv-i?  gv-wa-tli-s-di, i-yu-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di yv-wi ge-tsi-ne-lv-hi yi-ge-se, na-s-gi ye-li gv-ni-dv gv-wa-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv a-du-da-le-s-di ge-sv yv-di-da-le-hv-s-ge-i.

090322.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏛᏓᎴᎲᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ.
090322.english: But the scripture hath concluded all under sin, that the promise by faith of Jesus Christ might be given to them that believe.
090322.phonetic: A-se-no go-we-li ga-lv-quo-di gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-ne-ha ni-ga-di-yu u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-du-i-s-dv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nv-dv-da-le-hv-s-gi, na-s-gi ge-tsi-ne-di-yi a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi.

090323.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏ ᏂᎦᎾᏄᎪᎬᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏂᎦᏛᏅᎩ, ᎡᎩᏍᏚᎲᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ.
090323.english: But before faith came, we were kept under the law, shut up unto the faith which should afterwards be revealed.
090323.phonetic: Go-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-si ni-ga-na-nu-go-gv-na tsi-ge-se-i, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv ha-wi-ni-di-tlv ni-ga-dv-nv-gi, e-gi-s-du-hv-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv o-ni gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-di ge-sv i-ya-s-di.

090324.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏱ ᏗᎦᏘᏁᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
090324.english: Wherefore the law was our schoolmaster to bring us unto Christ, that we might be justified by faith.
090324.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-ge-yo-hv-s-gi ge-sv-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv-yi di-ga-ti-ne-gi, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv i-ga-du-da-le-s-do-di-yi.

090325.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏨ, ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᏱᎩ.
090325.english: But after that faith is come, we are no longer under a schoolmaster.
090325.phonetic: Go-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv tsu-na-nu-go-tsv, v-tla hna-quo di-de-yo-hv-s-gi di-ga-ti-ni-do-hi yi-gi.

090326.cherokee: ᏂᏥᎥᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
090326.english: For ye are all the children of God by faith in Christ Jesus.
090326.phonetic: Ni-tsi-v-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa e-tso-i-yu-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

090327.cherokee: ᏂᏥᎥᏰᏃ ᏤᏣᏬᎥᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏣᎵᎪᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏣᏄᏬᎥ.
090327.english: For as many of you as have been baptized into Christ have put on Christ.
090327.phonetic: Ni-tsi-v-ye-no tse-tsa-wo-v-hi tsi-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv e-tsa-li-go-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv e-tsa-nu-wo-v.

090328.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᎭ ᎠᏧᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏴ, ᏂᏥᎥᏰᏃ ᎢᎨᏣᏍᏗᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎡᏥᏯᎥᎢ.
090328.english: There is neither Jew nor Greek, there is neither bond nor free, there is neither male nor female: for ye are all one in Christ Jesus.
090328.phonetic: V-tla-ye-ha A-tsu-si, a-le A-go-i, v-tla a-tsi-na-tla-i, a-le na-tsi-na-tla-v-na, v-tla a-s-ga-ya, a-le a-ge-yv, ni-tsi-v-ye-no i-ge-tsa-s-di-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa e-tsi-ya-v-i.

090329.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏱᎩ ᏂᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏘᏴᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛᎢ.
090329.english: And if ye be Christ's, then are ye Abraham's seed, and heirs according to the promise.
090329.phonetic: I-yu a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-tse-li yi-gi ni-hi, hna-quo E-qua-ha-mi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ni-tsa-li-s-di-ha, a-le i-tsa-tse-li-ga u-ti-yv-hi na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv a-du-i-s-dv-i.

090401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏘᏰᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᎾᏓᎴᎿᎭᎣ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ, ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎡᎦᏃ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ.
090401.english: Now I say, That the heir, as long as he is a child, differeth nothing from a servant, though he be lord of all;
090401.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, Na-s-gi u-ti-ye-di ge-sv-i, a-yo-li ge-sv i-go-hi-dv, v-tla yi-du-na-da-le-hna-o a-tsi-na-tla-i, nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi e-ga-no nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di.

090402.cherokee: ᏕᎤᏁᎶᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎬᏪᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏕᏌᏯᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᏚᏒᏍᏛ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ.
090402.english: But is under tutors and governors until the time appointed of the father.
090402.phonetic: De-u-ne-lo-do-s-gi-ni di-gv-we-yo-hv-s-gi a-le u-na-de-sa-ya-s-di-de-gi a-ga-yv-li-ge-i du-sv-s-dv gv-di-s-gi.

090403.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ, ᎠᏏ ᏗᏗᏲᎵ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᏤᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎢᎦᏓᏄᏴᏛᎩ ᏗᎴᏅᏙᏗ ᏗᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090403.english: Even so we, when we were children, were in bondage under the elements of the world:
090403.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv, a-si di-di-yo-li tsi-ge-sv-gi, tse-gi-na-tla-i ge-sv-gi, i-ga-da-nu-yv-dv-gi di-le-nv-do-di di-de-lo-qua-s-di e-lo-hi e-hi ge-sv-i.

090404.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎲᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏅᏎ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎢ, ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲ ᎤᏓᏄᏴᏕᎢ,
090404.english: But when the fullness of the time was come, God sent forth his Son, made of a woman, made under the law,
090404.phonetic: A-se-no na-hi-yu a-se-lv-hi ge-sv a-ka-li-i u-s-qua-lv-hv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-nv-se U-we-tsi a-ge-yv u-na-nu-go-wi-se-i, di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv u-da-nu-yv-de-i,

090405.cherokee: ᏧᏚᏴᏗᏱ ᏧᏭᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏰᎸᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏄᏴᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎢᏰᎬᏁᏗᏱ.
090405.english: To redeem them that were under the law, that we might receive the adoption of sons.
090405.phonetic: Tsu-du-yv-di-yi tsu-wu-da-le-s-di-yi u-ye-lv-se na-s-gi u-na-da-nu-yv-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv-i, na-s-gi a-yv tsu-we-tsi i-ye-gv-ne-di-yi.

090406.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏥᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏅᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ, ᎤᏪᎷᎦ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎠᏆ, ᎡᏙᏓ.
090406.english: And because ye are sons, God hath sent forth the Spirit of his Son into your hearts, crying, Abba, Father.
090406.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsu-we-tsi tsi-ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv, na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-nv-sv U-we-tsi U-da-nv-do di-tsa-da-nv-do-gi-hi, u-we-lu-ga hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, A-qua, E-do-da.

090407.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏣᎾᏝᎢ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏪᏥᏉᏍᎩᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏘᏰᎯ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏅᎯ.
090407.english: Wherefore thou art no more a servant, but a son; and if a son, then an heir of God through Christ.
090407.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-tla hna-quo e-tsa-na-tla-i yi-gi, u-we-tsi-quo-s-gi-ni; a-le i-yu u-we-tsi yi-gi, hna-quo tsu-gv-wa-lo-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ne-di ge-sv tsa-ti-ye-hi, Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-nv-hi.

090408.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᎯᏳᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏁᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090408.english: Howbeit then, when ye knew not God, ye did service unto them which by nature are no gods.
090408.phonetic: A-se-no na-hi-yu-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi ne-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi, go-hu-s-di de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hv-gi na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi u-na-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

090409.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏯᏛᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎢᏣᏨᎭ ᏙᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏗᎴᏅᏙᏗ ᏗᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏏ ᎾᎿᎭᏥᏣᏚᎵ ᏤᏥᎾᏝ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ?
090409.english: But now, after that ye have known God, or rather are known of God, how turn ye again to the weak and beggarly elements, whereunto ye desire again to be in bondage?
090409.phonetic: A-se-no go-hi tsi-gi, hna-quo e-tsi-ga-do-v-sv-hi tsi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le ya-dv-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-ga-do-v-sv-hi tsi-gi, ga-do di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha i-tsa-tsv-ha do-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di-ha a-wa-na-ga-la a-le u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi di-le-nv-do-di di-de-lo-qua-s-di, na-s-gi a-si na-hna tsi-tsa-du-li tse-tsi-na-tla ta-li-ne i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi?

090410.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙ ᏓᏙᏓᏇᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏦᎳᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏍᏆᎸᎮᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏕᏘᏴᎮᎬᎢ.
090410.english: Ye observe days, and months, and times, and years.
090410.phonetic: De-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-do da-do-da-que-gv-i, a-le da-tso-la-ne-gv-i, a-le da-s-qua-lv-he-gv-i, a-le da-de-ti-yv-he-gv-i.

090411.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎾᏰᎢᏎᎭᏉ, ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᎦᏥᏯᏛᏁᎸ ᎨᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
090411.english: I am afraid of you, lest I have bestowed upon you labour in vain.
090411.phonetic: I-tsv-na-ye-i-se-ha-quo, a-se-quo-quo go-hu-s-di yi-ga-tsi-ya-dv-ne-lv ge-li-s-gv i-yu-s-di.

090412.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏆᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᏂᏣᏍᏛᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏆᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ, ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎢᏍᎩᏴᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ;
090412.english: Brethren, I beseech you, be as I am; for I am as ye are: ye have not injured me at all.
090412.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha a-yv na-qua-s-dv na-s-gi-ya i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi; ni-tsa-s-dv-ye-no na-s-gi-ya na-qua-s-di a-yv, v-tla go-hu-s-di u-so-nv i-s-gi-yv-ne-lv-hi yi-gi;

090413.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸᎢ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ;
090413.english: Ye know how through infirmity of the flesh I preached the gospel unto you at the first.
090413.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsi-ga-ta-ha a-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu ge-sv a-gi-que-da-lv-i i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv i-gv-yi-yi;

090414.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᎬᎵᏲᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᏣᏇᎲᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᏅᎵᏌᎵ ᏱᏥᏰᎸᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏲᎢᏎᎴᎢ; ᏕᏍᎩᏯᏓᏂᎸᏨᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
090414.english: And my temptation which was in my flesh ye despised not, nor rejected; but received me as an angel of God, even as Christ Jesus.
090414.phonetic: A-le tsi-gv-li-yo-gv na-s-gi a-gi-que-da-lv tsa-que-hv-gi, v-tla nv-li-sa-li yi-tsi-ye-lv-ne-i, a-le v-tla yi-tsi-yo-i-se-le-i; de-s-gi-ya-da-ni-lv-tsv-gi-s-gi-ni di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li na-s-gi-ya-i, a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa na-s-gi-ya-i.

090415.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᎥᎩ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛᎩ!  ᎢᏨᏲᎢᏳᏓᏁᎭᏰᏃ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎢᏨᏒ ᏱᏗᏣᏓᎦᏖᏙᎢᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏱᏗᏍᎩᏁᎴᎢ.
090415.english: Where is then the blessedness ye spake of? for I bear you record, that, if it had been possible, ye would have plucked out your own eyes, and have given them to me.
090415.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-ga-v-gi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsa-da-nv-dv-gi!  i-tsv-yo-i-yu-da-ne-ha-ye-no, na-s-gi i-yu-no ye-li na-s-gi i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di yi-ge-se-i, i-tsv-sv yi-di-tsa-da-ga-te-do-i-se-i, a-le a-yv yi-di-s-gi-ne-le-i.

090416.cherokee: ᏥᎪᏃ ᏍᎩᏍᎦᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸᎢ?
090416.english: Am I therefore become your enemy, because I tell you the truth?
090416.phonetic: Tsi-go-no s-gi-s-ga-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv i-tsv-no-ne-lv-i?

090417.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘ ᎨᏥᎨᏳᎭ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏱᎨᏣᎵᏍᏚᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᏥᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
090417.english: They zealously affect you, but not well; yea, they would exclude you, that ye might affect them.
090417.phonetic: U-tsa-ti ge-tsi-ge-yu-ha, a-se-no v-tla o-s-dv u-gv-wa-li yi-gi; a-le ni-hi yi-ge-tsa-li-s-du-da, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti di-tsi-ge-yu-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

090418.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎾᎯᏳᏉ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲ ᎤᏩᏒ.
090418.english: But it is good to be zealously affected always in a good thing, and not only when I am present with you.
090418.phonetic: O-si-yu-s-gi-ni ni-go-hi-lv u-tsa-ti i-tsi-ge-yu-di-yi o-s-dv ge-sv-i, v-tla-no na-hi-yu-quo i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv u-wa-sv.

090419.cherokee: ᏗᏇᏥ ᏗᏣᏍᏗᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᏨᏁᎵᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ [ᎢᏗᎬᏤᎵᏛ] ᎢᏣᏕᏗᏱ, ᎬᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏙᏢᏅᎭ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ,
090419.english: My little children, of whom I travail in birth again until Christ be formed in you,
090419.phonetic: Di-que-tsi di-tsa-s-di-i, na-s-gi ta-li-ne i-tsv-ne-li-tsv-hi tsi-gi [i-di-gv-tse-li-dv] i-tsa-de-di-yi, gv-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv a-do-tlv-nv-ha de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i,

090420.cherokee: ᎬᏆᏚᎸᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏁᎬᎢ; ᎤᏯᏰᏃ ᎢᏨᏴᏍᎦ.
090420.english: I desire to be present with you now, and to change my voice; for I stand in doubt of you.
090420.phonetic: Gv-qua-du-lv-di ni-ga-li-s-di go-hi ge-sv i-tsv-ye-la-di-da-s-di-yi, a-le a-gi-ne-tli-yv-s-di-yi tsi-ne-gv-i; u-ya-ye-no i-tsv-yv-s-ga.

090421.cherokee: ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲ ᎢᏣᏓᏄᏴᏙᏗᏱ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏣᏛᎩᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ?
090421.english: Tell me, ye that desire to be under the law, do ye not hear the law?
090421.phonetic: S-gi-no-hv-si, ni-hi i-tsa-du-li-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv i-tsa-da-nu-yv-do-di-yi, tla-s-go yi-tsa-dv-gi-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di?

090422.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏁᎮᎢ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ.
090422.english: For it is written, that Abraham had two sons, the one by a bondmaid, the other by a freewoman.
090422.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la, na-s-gi E-qua-ha-mi a-ni-ta-li tsu-we-tsi a-ne-he-i, a-si-yv-wi a-tsi-na-tla-i a-ge-yv u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi, so-i-no na-tsi-na-tla-v-na a-ge-yv u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi.

090423.cherokee: ᎾᏃ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ, ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᏕᏔᏁᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏕᏁᎢ.
090423.english: But he who was of the bondwoman was born after the flesh; but he of the freewoman was by promise.
090423.phonetic: Na-no a-tsi-na-tla-i a-ge-yv u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi, u-que-da-li u-de-ta-ne-i; na-s-gi-ya na-tsi-na-tla-v-na a-ge-yv u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi a-du-i-s-dv na-s-gi-ya u-de-ne-i.

090424.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗ; ᏌᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏌᎾᏱ ᎣᏓᎸ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏕᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ ᏗᎨᏥᎾᏢᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎮᎦ ᏥᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗ.
090424.english: Which things are an allegory: for these are the two covenants; the one from the mount Sinai, which gendereth to bondage, which is Agar.
090424.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi da-tli-lo-s-di; hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi ta-li ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv da-tli-lo-s-di; sa-quo ge-sv Sa-na-yi o-da-lv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, na-s-gi tsi-de-ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga di-ge-tsi-na-tlv-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi He-ga tsi-da-tli-lo-s-di.

090425.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎮᎦ ᏌᎾᏱ ᎣᏓᎸ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎡᎴᏈᎠ ᏦᏓᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏕᎨᏥᎾᏝᎠ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏪᏥ.
090425.english: For this Agar is mount Sinai in Arabia, and answereth to Jerusalem which now is, and is in bondage with her children.
090425.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi He-ga Sa-na-yi o-da-lv da-tli-lo-s-di, E-le-qui-a tso-da-lv, na-s-gi Tsi-lu-si-li-mi na-s-gi-ya tsi-gi, na-s-gi go-hi nu-s-dv-i, na-s-gi-ye-no de-ge-tsi-na-tla-a u-wa-sv a-le na-s-gi tsu-we-tsi.

090426.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏨᏗᎦᏚᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᎩᏥ.
090426.english: But Jerusalem which is above is free, which is the mother of us all.
090426.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-s-gi-ni ga-lv-la-di tsv-di-ga-du-ha na-s-gi na-tsi-na-tla-v-na, na-s-gi a-yv ni-di-v i-gi-tsi.

090427.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ, ᎭᎵᎮᎵᎩ ᏔᎷᎸᎥᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏔᏓᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎾ; ᎭᎴᏅ ᎮᎷᎲᎦ, ᏂᎯ ᏂᏘᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎬᎾ; ᎾᏰᏃ, ᎾᏥᏰᎲᎾ ᎤᏟ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᏪᎧᎭ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᏰᎯ.
090427.english: For it is written, Rejoice, thou barren that bearest not; break forth and cry, thou that travailest not: for the desolate hath many more children than she which hath an husband.
090427.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv i-go-we-la, Ha-li-he-li-gi ta-lu-lv-v-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi ni-ta-da-na-nu-go-wi-s-gv-na; ha-le-nv he-lu-hv-ga, ni-hi ni-ti-na-nu-go-wi-s-gv-na; na-ye-no, na-tsi-ye-hv-na u-tli na-ni-v du-we-ka-ha tsu-we-tsi e-s-ga-quo na a-tsi-ye-hi.

090428.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᎢᎦᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᏏᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏕᎢ.
090428.english: Now we, brethren, as Isaac was, are the children of promise.
090428.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-yv, i-da-li-nv-tli, a-du-i-s-dv i-ga-de-ta-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya E-si-gi tsi-nu-s-de-i.

090429.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090429.english: But as then he that was born after the flesh persecuted him that was born after the Spirit, even so it is now.
090429.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na-hi-yu tsi-ge-se-i, na-s-gi u-que-da-li u-de-ta-nv-hi tsa-de-ya-do-di-s-ge na-s-gi na A-da-nv-do u-de-ta-nv-hi, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-di go-hi ge-sv-i.

090430.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏙ ᎠᏗᎭ ᎪᏪᎵ?  ᎯᏄᎪᏩ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ; ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢᏰᏃ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏪᎳᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏪᏥ.
090430.english: Nevertheless what saith the scripture? Cast out the bondwoman and her son: for the son of the bondwoman shall not be heir with the son of the freewoman.
090430.phonetic: A-se-no ga-do a-di-ha go-we-li?  Hi-nu-go-wa a-tsi-na-tla-i a-ge-yv a-le na-s-gi u-we-tsi; a-tsi-na-tla-i-ye-no a-ge-yv u-we-tsi, v-tla u-we-la-di-s-do-di yi-ge-se-s-di u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv na-tsi-na-tla-v-na a-ge-yv u-we-tsi.

090431.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏴ, ᎾᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾᏍᎩᏂ.
090431.english: So then, brethren, we are not children of the bondwoman, but of the free.
090431.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla a-tsi-na-tla-i a-ge-yv tsu-we-tsi yi-gi a-yv, na-tsi-na-tla-v-na-s-gi-ni.

090501.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏥᏙᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏂᏕᎩᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏂᎦᎩᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᏂᎬᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏥᎡᏥᎩᎳᎾᎳᏗᏍᏔᏂ ᎠᏓᎾᏢᎥᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎳᎾᎶ.
090501.english: Stand fast therefore in the liberty wherewith Christ hath made us free, and be not entangled again with the yoke of bondage.
090501.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsi-do-ge-s-di na-s-gi na-hna ni-de-gi-na-tla-v-na ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv ni-ga-gi-na-tla-v-na ni-gv-ne-lv-i, a-le tle-s-di ta-li-ne tsi-e-tsi-gi-la-na-la-di-s-ta-ni a-da-na-tlv-v-s-gi a-gi-la-na-lo.

090502.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏕᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏴᎦᏰᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏓ.
090502.english: Behold, I Paul say unto you, that if ye be circumcised, Christ shall profit you nothing.
090502.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo, a-yv Quo-la hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, na-s-gi i-yu-no yi-de-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv, Ga-lo-ne-dv v-tla go-hu-s-di yv-ga-ye-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-da.

090503.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᎦᏥᏲᎢᏳᏓᏁᎭ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎾᏚᏓᎸᎥᏍᎦ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᎰᎲᏍᏗᏱ.
090503.english: For I testify again to every man that is circumcised, that he is a debtor to do the whole law.
090503.phonetic: A-le ta-li-ne i-ga-tsi-yo-i-yu-da-ne-ha na-ni-v na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi, na-s-gi a-na-du-da-lv-v-s-ga ni-ga-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv i-yu-na-dv-ne-ho-hv-s-di-yi.

090504.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏰᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᏂᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏍᎩ; ᏕᏥᏲᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090504.english: Christ is become of no effect unto you, whosoever of you are justified by the law; ye are fallen from grace.
090504.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hu-s-di ga-ye-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ni-ga-li-s-da, ni-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-tsa-du-da-le-s-di-s-gi; de-tsi-yo-hi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv-i.

090505.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎢᏗᎦᏘᏴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎢᎦᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090505.english: For we through the Spirit wait for the hope of righteousness by faith.
090505.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no A-da-nv-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv i-di-ga-ti-yv u-du-gi i-gv-sv i-ga-du-da-le-s-do-di-yi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i.

090506.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏮᏗᏗᏐ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
090506.english: For in Jesus Christ neither circumcision availeth anything, nor uncircumcision; but faith which worketh by love.
090506.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no Tsi-sa u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ge-sv a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv v-tla go-hu-s-di gv-do-di yi-gi, a-le a-hu-s-de-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i; go-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv na-s-gi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv tsu-wv-di-di-so du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

090507.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏣᏙᎩᏯᏍᎬᎩ; ᎦᎪ ᎢᏥᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎴ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ?
090507.english: Ye did run well; who did hinder you that ye should not obey the truth?
090507.phonetic: O-si-yu i-tsa-do-gi-ya-s-gv-gi; ga-go i-tsi-yo-s-do-da-ne-le, na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na nu-li-s-ta-nv u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i?

090508.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏍᏗᏰᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎢᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ.
090508.english: This persuasion cometh not of him that calleth you.
090508.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi e-tsi-s-di-ye-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi v-tla i-tsi-ya-nv-dv u-da-nv-te-lv-hi yi-gi.

090509.english: A little leaven leaveneth the whole lump.

090510.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏯᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎢᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎦᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
090510.english: I have confidence in you through the Lord, that ye will be none otherwise minded: but he that troubleth you shall bear his judgment, whosoever he be.
090510.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsi-ya-li-s-ga-s-do-di, ni-hi i-tse-hv U-gv-wa-li na-s-gi u-tlo-yi-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na i-tsa-de-ya-do-di-s-gi u-s-dv-di-s-di ge-se-s-di, u-ne-la-gi gi-lo ga-ge-se-s-di.

090511.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏ ᏱᎦᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎤᏲ ᏂᎥᏋᎿᎭᏕᎦ?  ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎲᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᏗᏓᏙᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛᎢ.
090511.english: And I, brethren, if I yet preach circumcision, why do I yet suffer persecution? then is the offence of the cross ceased.
090511.phonetic: A-le a-yv i-da-li-nv-tli, i-yu-no a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv a-si yi-ga-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga, ga-do-no a-si-quo u-yo ni-v-quv-hna-de-ga?  hna-quo a-hv-dv ni-ga-li-s-di-ha di-da-do-de-s-di-s-gi ge-sv da-da-hna-wa-s-dv-i.

090512.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᏥᏰᎸᎾ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏱᏗᎨᏥᎧᎲᏒ ᎨᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ.
090512.english: I would they were even cut off which trouble you.
090512.phonetic: O-si-yu yi-tsi-ye-lv-na na-s-quo yi-di-ge-tsi-ka-hv-sv ge-tsa-de-ya-do-di-s-gi tsi-gi.

090513.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎡᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏤᎵ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎠᏗᎾ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏓᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏨᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᏚᎸᎲᎥᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏥᏥᎳᏅᏓᏕᎶ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏕᏣᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
090513.english: For, brethren, ye have been called unto liberty; only use not liberty for an occasion to the flesh, but by love serve one another.
090513.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, e-tsi-ya-nv-dv i-tsa-da-tse-li i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi; a-di-na tle-s-di na-s-gi i-tsa-da-tse-li ge-sv yi-tsv-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi u-que-da-li u-du-lv-hv-v-s-gv i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi tsi-tsi-la-nv-da-de-lo na-s-gi-ya-i; a-da-ge-yu-di-s-gi-ni i-tsv-di-s-gv o-s-dv ni-de-tsa-da-dv-ne-he-s-di.

090514.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏰᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏚᎵᏁᏨ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎢᎧᏁᏨᎯ ᎠᎧᎵᎢᎭ, ᎯᎠᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎾᎥ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ ᎯᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒᎢ.
090514.english: For all the law is fulfilled in one word, even in this; Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself.
090514.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-ye-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di du-li-ne-tsv sa-quo-quo i-ka-ne-tsv-hi a-ka-li-i-ha, hi-a-quo na-s-gi, Na-v i-di-s-da-da-la hi-ge-yu-se-s-di na-s-gi-ya tsv-sv ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv-i.

090515.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏙᏣᏓᏍᎦᎶᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏣᏓᏯᎣᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏥᏙᏣᏓᏛᏔᏂ.
090515.english: But if ye bite and devour one another, take heed that ye be not consumed one of another.
090515.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni do-tsa-da-s-ga-lo-ge-s-di a-le do-tsa-da-ya-o-hv-s-ge-s-di, i-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di tle-s-di tsi-do-tsa-da-dv-ta-ni.

090516.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ ᎢᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏃ ᎤᎬᎥᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏂᎨᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
090516.english: This I say then, Walk in the Spirit, and ye shall not fulfill the lust of the flesh.
090516.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, A-da-nv-do-gi-hi i-tsa-i-se-s-di, u-que-da-li-no u-gv-v-s-gv v-tla yi-ni-ge-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di.

090517.cherokee: ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏰᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏓᎦᏘᎴᎪ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏓᎦᏘᎴᎪ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏗᎾᏓᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏅᎨᏣᏛᎦ.
090517.english: For the flesh lusteth against the Spirit, and the Spirit against the flesh: and these are contrary the one to the other: so that ye cannot do the things that ye would.
090517.phonetic: U-que-da-li-ye-no u-du-li-s-gv da-ga-ti-le-go A-da-nv-do, a-le A-da-nv-do u-du-li-s-gv da-ga-ti-le-go u-que-da-li; na-s-gi-no hi-a di-na-da-tlu-di-s-gi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha; na-s-gi-no ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha nu-s-dv i-tsa-du-li-s-gv v-tla yi-nv-ge-tsa-dv-ga.

090518.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᏗᏣᏘᏂᏙᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᎲ ᏱᎨᏣᏚᏓᎸ.
090518.english: But if ye be led of the Spirit, ye are not under the law.
090518.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni yi-di-tsa-ti-ni-do-ha, v-tla di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-hv yi-ge-tsa-du-da-lv.

090519.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ^ᎠᏓᏲᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᏓᎭ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ,
090519.english: Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness,
090519.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-que-da-li nu-s-dv de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu; hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-di^A-da-yo-ne-di ge-sv-i, u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i, ga-da-ha di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, u-ne-gu-tsi-dv ge-sv-i,

090520.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏗᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏙᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏓᏓᏈᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏗᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏓᏛᏳᏤᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏓᏐᎮᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏔᎵ ᎢᏯᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ,
090520.english: Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies,
090520.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi di-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-do-nv-di ge-sv-i, a-da-da-qui-s-di ge-sv-i, di-di-yo-s-di ge-sv-i, di-da-dv-yu-tse-di ge-sv-i, a-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, di-da-so-he-di ge-sv-i, ta-li i-ya-da-di-s-di ge-sv-i, u-na-da-tse-li-dv ge-sv-i,

090521.cherokee: ᎠᏛᏳᎨᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏗᏓᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏓᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᏂᏴᏍᏕᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗᏓᏂ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏂᏨᏃᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏧᏩᎫᏔᏅᏒᎢ, Ꮎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
090521.english: Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of God.
090521.phonetic: A-dv-yu-ge-di ge-sv-i, di-da-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, u-da-yv-s-de-s-di ge-sv-i, tsu-ni-yv-s-de-s-gi tsu-ni-la-wi-i-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di-da-ni; hi-a na-s-gi ga-yu-la ni-tsv-no-ne-ha, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo i-tsv-no-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi tsu-wa-gu-ta-nv-sv-i, na na-s-gi i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi v-tla u-na-tse-li yi-nv-ga-li-s-da U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi.

090522.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ, ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ, ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
090522.english: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith,
090522.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-ga, a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, u-li-he-li-s-di, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv, gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i, u-da-nv-ti ge-sv-i, o-s-dv ge-sv-i, go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i,

090523.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗᏓᏂ ᏗᎦᏘᎴᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏯᎭ.
090523.english: Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law.
090523.phonetic: U-da-nv-ti ge-sv-i, a-li-si-na-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di-da-ni di-ga-ti-le-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di v-tla ya-ha.

090524.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᎩ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᏅ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᏠᏯᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᎸᎲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090524.english: And they that are Christ's have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts.
090524.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-tse-li-ga tsi-gi da-da-hna-wa-s-dv u-na-dv-nv u-que-da-li ge-sv gv-wa-tlo-ya-s-di u-du-lv-hv-di ge-sv a-le u-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

090525.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ ᎢᏕᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏕᎦᏘᏂᏒ ᎢᏓᎢᏎᏍᏗ.
090525.english: If we live in the Spirit, let us also walk in the Spirit.
090525.phonetic: I-yu-no A-da-nv-do-gi-hi i-de-he-s-di, na-s-quo A-da-nv-do de-ga-ti-ni-sv i-da-i-se-s-di.

090526.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᎦᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ Ꮎ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ; [ᏞᏍᏗ] ᏱᏗᏓᏓᎿᎭᎸᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏗᏓᏓᏛᏳᏤᎮᏍᏗ.
090526.english: Let us not be desirous of vain glory, provoking one another, envying one another.
090526.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-ga-du-li-s-ge-s-di na ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi; [tle-s-di] yi-di-da-da-hna-lv-s-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le yi-di-da-da-dv-yu-tse-he-s-di.

090601.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏎᎦᏤᎸ ᏳᏍᎦᏅᏨ, ᏂᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᏣᏘᏂᏙᎯ ᎡᏥᏯᏂᏐᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎮᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏨᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏎᎦᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏰᏣᎪᎵᏯ.
090601.english: Brethren, if a man be overtaken in a fault, ye which are spiritual, restore such an one in the spirit of meekness; considering thyself, lest thou also be tempted.
090601.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, i-yu-no gi-lo yu-se-ga-tse-lv yu-s-ga-nv-tsv, ni-hi a-da-nv-do di-tsa-ti-ni-do-hi e-tsi-ya-ni-so-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi i-yu-dv-ne-lv-hi u-da-do-li-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, he-ya-ta-he-s-di tsv-sv ge-sv yi-nv-se-ga-gi ni-hi na-s-quo ye-tsa-go-li-ya.

090602.cherokee: ᏕᏣᎵᏅᏫᏍᏗᏕᎬ ᏕᏣᏓᏴᎡᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᎢᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
090602.english: Bear ye one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ.
090602.phonetic: De-tsa-li-nv-wi-s-di-de-gv de-tsa-da-yv-e-he-s-di, na-s-gi-no ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv i-tsi-ka-li-i-he-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

090603.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏰᎵ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏤᎸᏎᏍᏗ, ᎩᎶᏉᏃ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᏯᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗᎭ.
090603.english: For if a man think himself to be something, when he is nothing, he deceiveth himself.
090603.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no gi-lo ye-li gi-lo u-tse-lv-se-s-di, gi-lo-quo-no ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di, u-wa-sv-quo ya-da-li-da-s-di-ha.

090604.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏂᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᎵᎮᎵᏍᏙᏗ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090604.english: But let every man prove his own work, and then shall he have rejoicing in himself alone, and not in another.
090604.phonetic: A-se-no na-ni-v gi-lo a-ni-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di u-nv-sv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, hna-quo-no u-nv-sv ge-sv u-ni-he-s-di u-na-li-he-li-s-do-di, v-tla-no nv-wa-na-da-le ge-sv-i.

090605.english: For every man shall bear his own burden.

090606.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎨᏲᏅᎯ Ꭰ'ᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏪᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090606.english: Let him that is taught in the word communicate unto him that teacheth in all good things.
090606.phonetic: Na-s-gi na ka-no-he-dv a-ge-yo-nv-hi a-'-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi na u-we-yo-hv-s-gi nu-da-le-sv o-s-dv ge-sv-i.

090607.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᎵᏓᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝ ᎦᏰᏥᎶᏄᎡᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᏄᏍᏛᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏫᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎦᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
090607.english: Be not deceived; God is not mocked: for whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap.
090607.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-tsi-li-da-s-ta-ne-s-di; v-tla ga-ye-tsi-lo-nu-e-di yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi; nu-s-dv-ye-no gi-lo a-wi-s-gv-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo nu-s-de-s-di ga-tli-si-s-ge-s-di.

090608.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎠᏲᎩ ᎦᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ ᎠᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
090608.english: For he that soweth to his flesh shall of the flesh reap corruption; but he that soweth to the Spirit shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting.
090608.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no na u-wa-sv u-que-da-li a-wi-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi u-que-da-li u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi a-yo-gi ga-tli-si-s-ge-s-di; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na A-da-nv-do-gi-hi a-wi-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi A-da-nv-do u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi gv-ni-dv u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ga-tli-si-s-ge-s-di.

090609.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᎩᏯᏪᎨᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ; ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲᎭ ᎢᎩᏟᏐᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᏗᏗᏩᎾᎦᎶᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
090609.english: And let us not be weary in well doing: for in due season we shall reap, if we faint not.
090609.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di yi-di-gi-ya-we-ge-s-di o-s-dv de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i; na-hi-yu-ye-no a-s-qua-lv-hv-ha i-gi-tli-so-di ge-se-s-di, i-yu-no ni-di-di-wa-na-ga-lo-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di.

090610.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎨᎦᏛᏁᏗ ᏗᏜᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᏕᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ.
090610.english: As we have therefore opportunity, let us do good unto all men, especially unto them who are of the household of faith.
090610.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ye-li i-ge-ga-dv-ne-di di-dla-nv-da-di-s-ge-s-di, na-ni-v o-s-dv ni-de-da-dv-ne-he-s-di, ho u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di na-s-gi na a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi si-da-ne-lv-hi u-na-da-tlu-gv-i.

090611.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᏂᎦᏅᎯᏒ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᏋᏒ ᎠᏉᏰᏂ ᎠᏋᏔᏅᎯ.
090611.english: Ye see how large a letter I have written unto you with mine own hand.
090611.phonetic: I-tsi-go-wa-ti-ha ni-ga-nv-hi-sv go-we-li i-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv-i, a-quv-sv a-quo-ye-ni a-quv-ta-nv-hi.

090612.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᎨᎦᎦᏅᏗᏱ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᏤᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏨᏁᎰᎢ; ᏄᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎨᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏍᏛᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛᎢ.
090612.english: As many as desire to make a fair shew in the flesh, they constrain you to be circumcised; only lest they should suffer persecution for the cross of Christ.
090612.phonetic: Na-ni-v u-na-du-li-s-gi o-s-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi di-ge-ga-ga-nv-di-yi u-que-da-li ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-se tse-tsi-u-s-de-se-di-yi ni-ge-tsv-ne-ho-i; nu-na-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di ge-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-do-di-yi u-ni-s-dv-di-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li da-da-hna-wa-s-dv-i.

090613.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎨᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ ᏳᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏤᏥᎤᏍᏕᏎᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏇᏓᎸ ᎤᎾᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ.
090613.english: For neither they themselves who are circumcised keep the law; but desire to have you circumcised, that they may glory in your flesh.
090613.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no na-s-quo u-nv-sv na-s-gi di-ge-tsi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi yu-ni-s-qua-ni-go-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di; ni-hi-s-gi-ni tse-tsi-u-s-de-se-di-yi u-na-du-li-ha, na-s-gi i-tsi-que-da-lv u-na-tlv-qui-s-di-yi.

090614.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎠᎦᏛᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏆᏛᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᏢ.
090614.english: But God forbid that I should glory, save in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, by whom the world is crucified unto me, and I unto the world.
090614.phonetic: a-se-no gv-wa-tli-s-di go-hu-s-di a-qua-tlv-qui-s-do-di-yi u-wa-sv-s-gi-ni-no-nv da-da-hna-wa-s-dv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, na-s-gi e-lo-hi da-da-hna-wa-s-dv a-ga-dv-nv-hi tsi-gi a-yv ge-sv i-di-tlv, a-le a-yv v-qua-dv-nv-hi tsi-gi e-lo-hi ge-sv i-di-tlv.

090615.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ-ᏥᏌ ᏗᏁᎶᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎱᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎢᏤᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090615.english: For in Christ Jesus neither circumcision availeth anything, nor uncircumcision, but a new creature.
090615.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no--Tsi-sa di-ne-lo-do-di ge-sv a-hu-s-de-s-di ge-sv v-tla go-hu-s-di gv-do-di yi-gi, a-le a-hu-s-de-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i; i-tse-s-gi-ni i-ya-gv-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

090616.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏭᏁᎳᏗᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏭᏁᎳᏗᏓ.
090616.english: And as many as walk according to this rule, peace be on them, and mercy, and upon the Israel of God.
090616.phonetic: Na-ni-v-no na-s-gi hi-a di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-ni-ka-hna-wa-de-gi, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-le u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv wu-ne-la-di-da, a-le na-s-quo I-si-li U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga wu-ne-la-di-da.

090617.cherokee: ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏯᏆᏕᏯᏙᏔᏁᏍᏗ; ᏥᏰᎸᏰᏃ ᏓᎩᏁᎸᎭ ᎠᏐᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᏥᏯᏤᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
090617.english: From henceforth let no man trouble me: for I bear in my body the marks of the Lord Jesus.
090617.phonetic: Go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv tle-s-di gi-lo ya-qua-de-ya-do-ta-ne-s-di; tsi-ye-lv-ye-no da-gi-ne-lv-ha a-so-le-ho-hi-s-do-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa tsi-ya-tse-li ge-sv-i.

090618.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
090618.english: Brethren, the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
090618.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv da-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di di-tsa-da-nv-do.  E-me-nv.
